content.full_text:
February 4, 1992

Scott Hallavrin
Acting General Counsel
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804

Dear Mr. Hallavrin:

This is written on behalf of the Carson "Get Out The Vote" Committee to request a written confirmation of the verbal determination and guidance provided by John Wallace, Legal Division and Linda Cassidy, Technical Assistance Division of the FPCC. Specifically, we have been advised that there have been no changes in the laws or FPCC requirements which affect the advice provided via a March 22, 1984 letter (attached).

Simply stated, it is our understanding that, since the GOTV activities are non-partisan and do not support or oppose a candidate or measure, and its goal is to increase voter turnout in Carson's municipal election, these activities do not fall under the FPCC reporting requirements. Additionally, we understand that there is no requirement to identify the Committee further than noting "Carson GOTV".

I am enclosing, for your review, a sample of previous election materials.

Sincerely,

Robert K. Steins
Consultant

:mr
encl.
